mapper.insert: INSERT INTO movies (id, title, original_title, overview, poster_path, backdrop_path, release_date, vote_average, vote_count, popularity, original_language, runtime) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{originalTitle}, #{overview}, #{posterPath}, #{backdropPath}, #{releaseDate}, #{voteAverage}, #{voteCount}, #{popularity}, #{originalLanguage}, #{runtime}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE title=VALUES(title), original_title=VALUES(original_title), overview=VALUES(overview), poster_path=VALUES(poster_path), backdrop_path=VALUES(backdrop_path), release_date=VALUES(release_date), vote_average=VALUES(vote_average), vote_count=VALUES(vote_count), popularity=VALUES(popularity), original_language=VALUES(original_language), runtime=VALUES(runtime);
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, original_title AS originalTitle, overview, poster_path AS posterPath, backdrop_path AS backdropPath, release_date AS releaseDate, vote_average AS voteAverage, vote_count AS voteCount, popularity, original_language AS originalLanguage, runtime FROM movies

SELECT id, title, original_title AS originalTitle, overview, poster_path AS posterPath, backdrop_path AS backdropPath, release_date AS releaseDate, vote_average AS voteAverage, vote_count AS voteCount, popularity, original_language AS originalLanguage, runtime FROM movies WHERE release_date >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAY ORDER BY release_date DESC;

SELECT id, title, original_title AS originalTitle, overview, poster_path AS posterPath, backdrop_path AS backdropPath, release_date AS releaseDate, vote_average AS voteAverage, vote_count AS voteCount, popularity, original_language AS originalLanguage, runtime FROM movies ORDER BY popularity DESC LIMIT 20;

SELECT id, title, original_title AS originalTitle, overview, poster_path AS posterPath, backdrop_path AS backdropPath, release_date AS releaseDate, vote_average AS voteAverage, vote_count AS voteCount, popularity, original_language AS originalLanguage, runtime FROM movies ORDER BY vote_average DESC LIMIT 20;

SELECT id, title, original_title AS originalTitle, overview, poster_path AS posterPath, backdrop_path AS backdropPath, release_date AS releaseDate, vote_average AS voteAverage, vote_count AS voteCount, popularity, original_language AS originalLanguage, runtime FROM movies WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT person_id AS id, name, character_name AS characterName, profile_path AS profilePath FROM `cast` WHERE movie_id = #{movieId}
SELECT person_id AS id, name, job, profile_path AS profilePath FROM crew WHERE movie_id = #{movieId}
